ClientIndexName.description: The name of the client index.

Active.description: Indicates if Client Index is Active

ShowOnNewClient.description: Indicates if Client Index is shown on a new client profile

ShowOnEnrollmentRoster.description: Indicates if Client Index is shown on Enrollement Roster

EditOnEnrollmentRoster.description: Indicates if Client Index can be edited on Enrollement Roster

ShowInConsumerMode.description: Indicates if Client Index is shown in consumer mode.

RequiredConsumerMode.description: Indicates if the index is required when creating profiles in consumer mode.

RequiredBizMode.description: Indicates if the index is required when creating profiles in business mode.
